themes.exampleQuote: Sahil has been very kind & helpful with accepting custom orders whenever I come with my friends.
Delicious food! Authentic flavors! Must visit place
The staff were extremely rude and dismissive, which made the atmosphere feel unwelcoming.
Tried Indian food for the first time and I loved it. Excellent service!
Reva Modern Indian Cuisine is hands down our number one restaurant in Pittsburgh.

notable_quote: Reva first opened in June 2024 and I have been a regular customer ever since, the food taste is the best you can find in Pittsburgh and no other Indian restaurant can match the level.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers are emphatic about the food quality and repeatedly single out a specific staff member by name, but a thread of complaints about dismissive and arrogant service from other staff introduces real friction that the 80-percent five-star rate does not fully mask.
quarter_narrative: Thirty-three Pittsburgh creators have filmed Reva this quarter, producing 373,000-plus plays on TikTok without any involvement from the restaurant itself. The most telling video came from a creator whose mother works there, pulling 66,300 plays on a caption about family pride, which is the kind of unscripted storytelling no paid campaign replicates. Meanwhile, Reva sits fourth in Pittsburgh Asian Kitchens, a family led by Mola on the strength of creator collaboration fit, a signal where Reva is currently tied at the median but earning none of the credit because it has no TikTok account of its own to meet that energy. The rank moves when the restaurant starts showing up in its own story: address the service inconsistency surfaced in reviews, and the climb to the top of this family becomes a realistic near-term outcome.
tldr_read: Massive TikTok creator coverage and clean conversion path, paired with a dormant Instagram and no TikTok account of its own. Ones to Watch, #4 in Pittsburgh Asian Kitchens.
tldr_meaning: The ceiling here is genuinely high, 33 creators and 373,000 plays in one quarter is a signal most restaurants in this family will never generate, but the rank climbs only when the restaurant starts holding its side of that conversation and the service sentiment variance narrows.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Fourth In Asian Kitchens, Carried By 33 Creators. Reva Has No TikTok Account To Answer With.

playbook.headline: Claim a TikTok account, post once
playbook.action: 33 creators have generated 373,000-plus plays at Reva with zero reciprocal presence; one account and one video closes that gap immediately.

playbook.headline: Address the service gap directly
playbook.action: Two detailed negative reviews cite specific staff interactions by policy and tone; resolving those publicly lifts review sentiment off its current below-family-median position.

playbook.headline: Restart the Instagram feed now
playbook.action: The account went silent 72 days ago despite a 37.85-percent engagement rate, meaning the existing audience is primed; even two posts a month rebuilds the momentum signal.
